issue_title: Read-only is moving focus to the end of the page
issue_body_preview:
## Checklist

- [x] This is not covered in the [repository examples](https://github.com/niuware/mui-rte/tree/master/examples).
- [x] I am using the package [latest version](https://github.com/niuware/mui-rte/releases/latest).
- [x] This is a bug report or an enhancement proposal.

## Descripti
test_description_zh: 在页面中渲染一个设置为 readOnly 模式的 MUI-RTE 富文本编辑器组件，观察页面加载后浏览器的滚动位置和焦点状态。
expected_result_zh: 当 MUI-RTE 组件处于只读模式时，页面加载后焦点不应自动移动到编辑器内部，页面不应自动滚动到底部，浏览器滚动位置应保持在页面顶部或用户原本所在的位置。
